strategies.name: Fast B main
strategies.description: Quick B hit through main with core smokes.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: group B main, smoke CT, flash heaven -> go B

strategies.name: B main mid split
strategies.description: Hit B from main and mid together.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 mid, 3 B main, smoke CT -> go B

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane
notes: timing between main and mid matters

strategies.name: Mid control
strategies.description: Take mid and open connector decisions.
strategies.creator: System

goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid

strategies.name: A main mid split
strategies.description: Pressure A from main and mid.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 mid, 3 A main, smoke heaven -> go A

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane

strategies.name: Fake A to B
strategies.description: Show A pressure and switch to B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show A main, smoke CT -> rotate B

meta.purpose: pull rotation before the real hit
goodWhen: good if the team will rotate together

strategies.name: B site execute
strategies.description: Full B utility to isolate the site.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: group B, smoke CT + heaven -> go B

strategies.name: Silent A main
strategies.description: Walk A main and burst with one popflash.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: walk A main, popflash -> go A

goodWhen: good if the team can stay quiet

strategies.name: Mid to B burst
strategies.description: Take mid and explode toward B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid to B explode, flash out -> go B

meta.purpose: enter B through a second lane
goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid
notes: one player should cut heaven if possible

strategies.name: Delayed B main
strategies.description: Hide in B main and hit after one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide B main till 1:00, smoke CT + heaven -> go B

goodWhen: good if the team will wait for the timing

strategies.name: Canal lean to A
strategies.description: Use canals pressure to support an A finish.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show canals 2, then 5 A main + mid -> go A, smoke heaven

strategies.name: Mid to A wrap
strategies.description: Take mid and wrap toward A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take mid, then wrap A, smoke heaven -> go A

meta.purpose: enter A through a second lane
goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid
notes: works well with one A main lurk

strategies.name: Fast double-lane B
strategies.description: Use main and mid quickly into B together.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 mid 3 B main, smoke CT -> go B

strategies.name: Aggressive mid
strategies.description: Contest mid early.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: Triple B hold
strategies.description: Lean heavier into B defense.
strategies.creator: System

strategies.name: Canals push
strategies.description: Push canals for info or flank path.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: A main control
strategies.description: Fight or stabilize around A main.
strategies.creator: System

strategies.name: B stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra players on B.
strategies.creator: System

strategies.name: A retake
strategies.description: Delay A and retake together.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: save utility for the A retake
goodWhen: good if the team will save utility

strategies.name: Mid boost
strategies.description: Use a boost to watch or contest mid.
strategies.creator: System

strategies.name: Double mid
strategies.description: Use two players to deny mid access.
strategies.creator: System

notes: rotate one off with good info

strategies.name: Save crossfire
strategies.description: Compact trade setup for fragile economy.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: protect weapons and avoid isolated duels
goodWhen: good if the team will not overpeek

strategies.name: B anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare to stop fast B main rounds.
strategies.creator: System

strategies.name: Canals lurk catch
strategies.description: Hold deeper canals to catch late lurks.
strategies.creator: System

strategies.name: A passive hold
strategies.description: Hold A from safer deeper angles.
strategies.creator: System

notes: mid player must call rotate quickly
